meta.title: The Lost Decade:  ICS Vulnerabilities Since 2001
meta.description:
The Lost Decade is a term veterans in the ICS security world use for the ten years after 9/11 when little progress was made in ICS security.

Sean McBride of Critical Intelligence (which was later bought by iSight which was bought by FireEye) provides detail and statistical analysis of publicly disclosed ICS vulnerabilities since 2001 - 2011.

The presentation discusses the growth rate, where they are coming from, how many have been fixed and much more.
